tooltip: Select Princess Makeela Riju as your hero of choice.

heroSelectionDescriptionElements.tooltipText: Riju focuses on Archer and Seal units.
Allows you to summon Princess Riju, a mounted Cavalry Archer with a ranged attack.
Summon a diverese set of Sandseals units, cavalry units that can cross bodies of water.
Summon Golden Gladiators, though infantry units.
Small City Center that can heal units.
